name: krasterisk-v4
description: IP PBX Krasterisk — Modern Web Interface

scripts.dev:backend: npm run build -w @krasterisk/shared && npm run start:dev -w @krasterisk/backend
scripts.build: npm run build -w @krasterisk/shared && npm run build -w @krasterisk/backend && npm run build -w @krasterisk/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @krasterisk/backend && npm run test -w @krasterisk/frontend
scripts.test:cc: npm run test:cc -w @krasterisk/backend && npm run test:cc -w @krasterisk/frontend
scripts.test:ai: npm run test:ai -w @krasterisk/backend && npm run test:ai -w @krasterisk/frontend
scripts.test:cov: npm run test:cov -w @krasterisk/backend && npm run test:cov -w @krasterisk/frontend
scripts.test:e2e:install: npm --prefix e2e install && npm --prefix e2e exec playwright install --with-deps chromium

author: Krasterisk LTD
